stories.title: [Articles] Efficacy and safety of tirofiban after successful endovascular reperfusion in acute ischaemic stroke (ATTRACTION) in China: a multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial
stories.summary: In patients with acute ischaemic stroke due to anterior-circulation large-vessel occlusion achieving successful reperfusion, adjunctive tirofiban increased the likelihood of functional independence compared with placebo. Although symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage occurred numerically more often w

stories.title: [Articles] Safety, pharmacokinetics, and exploratory efficacy of the oral ghrelin receptor agonist AC01 in heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (GOAL-HF1): a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 1b/2a study
stories.summary: In patients with HFrEF, AC01 over 28 days appeared safe and well tolerated, and no major harms were identified in this early-phase study. These findings support further investigations of AC01 in larger studies.

today.name: This Afternoon
today.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 85. Southwest wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

tonight.name: Tonight
tonight.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 71. South wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

tomorrow.name: Sunday
tomorrow.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 93. Heat index values as high as 103. South wind 1 to 7 mph.

weather.whatToWear: Light breathable layers + packable rain shell today (53% storm chance after 2pm). Tomorrow's the bigger weather story — 93°F with heat index pushing 109°F. Hydrate aggressively; outdoor plans should shift to morning or after 7pm.

life.oneThing: Take the Meramec River trail at Pacific Palways (10 min drive) this morning before the storms fire — shaded, paved, dog-friendly. Better default than the couch if you're a fair-weather wanderer.

rec.title: The Courage to Be Disliked
rec.blurb: Re-read on a stormy Saturday morning. Adler's individual psychology lands differently when you're not chasing the next task — sit with the 'task is to be yourself' chapter and the weekend reshapes from there.

driveDistanceIdeas.name: Springfield, MO
driveDistanceIdeas.blurb: 3 hr. Bass Pro flagship + Wonders of Wildlife

retirement.planningNote: Q3 estimated-tax payment due September 15. When you're back at the desk Monday, block 30 minutes to confirm YTD vs. the cap — easy to lose track of in summer. If TWS is offline, no action.

opportunities.title: Q3 estimated-tax payment due September 15
opportunities.blurb: Calendar block 30 min Mon to confirm YTD income vs. cap. If under-withheld, top up before Sep 15 to avoid Q4 underpayment penalties.

opportunities.title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 — agent loop improvements
opportunities.blurb: Sonnet 4.5 brings strong improvements on long-horizon agent tasks. Worth a 30-min spike this weekend to see if it replaces your default Sonnet model for delegate_task work.

opportunities.title: 10Y Treasury at 4.38% — best WTD jump in 2 weeks
opportunities.blurb: Rates pulled back 10bps this week. If you've been waiting to top up I-Bonds or T-Bill ladders, this is a decent entry. Watch for FOMC minutes Sep 17.

opportunities.title: Vercel deploy hook for scheduled jobs
opportunities.blurb: Now that daily-brief deploys are working end-to-end, consider extending the pattern to other repos (personal dashboards, status pages).

opportunities.title: Strength training window after the storm passes
opportunities.blurb: Storms cut the outdoor window. Indoor session — 30 min compound lifts — is the highest-leverage thing for 60+ longevity per this week's research.

summaryBullets: Markets sold off this week — S&P -1.6%, Nasdaq -3.3% on AI multiple compression. Stay the course on your themes.
Biggest change: MSTR volatility picked up after STRC dividend cut chatter. Not actionable yet, but on the watchlist.
Ignore: altcoin noise. Bitcoin ETF flows are what matters for your exposure thesis.
Biggest opportunity: 10Y at 4.38% is your best T-Bill ladder entry in 3 weeks.
Biggest risk: rate-path repricing into Sep 17 FOMC — could compress MSTR mark if BTC also wobbles.

actionItems.title: Block 30 min Mon for Q3 estimated-tax YTD review
actionItems.rationale: Sep 15 deadline + easy to lose track of in summer.

actionItems.title: Spike-test Sonnet 4.5 on one delegate_task
actionItems.rationale: Frontier-model move is meaningful for retirement-business AI capability.

actionItems.title: Top up T-Bill ladder at 4.38% 10Y
actionItems.rationale: Best rates in 3 weeks; lock before Sep 17 FOMC.

actionItems.title: Indoor strength session after the storm
actionItems.rationale: Compound lifts are highest-leverage for 60+ longevity per current research.

actionItems.title: Read Courage to Be Disliked 'task is to be yourself' chapter

funFact.fact: The 10Y Treasury yield has been below the S&P 500 dividend yield for only 4 of the last 25 years. We're in one of those rare windows right now — last seen briefly in mid-2022.

indicators.label: U.S. Dollar (DXY)
indicators.source: ICE US Dollar Index - Index - C

markets.whyParagraph: Markets sold off this week as a stronger-than-expected June jobs report pushed the 10Y yield from 4.28% to 4.38% — a 10bps jump in five sessions. The Nasdaq took the worst of it (-3.3%) because long-duration growth names are most sensitive to discount-rate shifts. Bitcoin tracked equities (BTC -3.5%) and the DXY firmed slightly (+0.3%). The setup into next week's CPI print is the key driver — a softer print would unwind the rate move and relieve the multiple compression.

items.headline: Q3 estimated-tax payment — Sep 15 deadline
items.detail: Confirm YTD income vs. safe-harbor thresholds. If you're under-withheld by 10%+, top up before Sep 15 to avoid Q4 penalties.

items.headline: 2026 IRMAA brackets — income thresholds held flat
items.detail: Social Security released 2026 Medicare Part B/D IRMAA brackets last week. Holding flat from 2025 is good news for retirees on Medicare.

items.headline: Q4 Roth conversion window opening
items.detail: If your ACAs dropped on Jan 1, 2026 income, you have a one-time conversion opportunity before Dec 31. Worth modeling in your retirement income stack.

items.headline: RMD age moved to 73, then 75 for those born 1960+
items.detail: Confirm your RMD start year against your birth year. Missing the deadline triggers a 25% excise penalty.
